title: Auto-update mechanism
description: sweech update exists but needs polish. Add version check on startup, changelog display.

context.text: Auto-update: 24h cache check via npm registry, one-line startup notice, sweech update shows changelog from GitHub releases, SweechBar update badge in header. 32 new tests.

acceptanceCriteria: Check for new version once per day on startup
Show one-line update notice if available
